sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50891" key="i)rino/miktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰρῐνόμικτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n50891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixed with iris-oil</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
